tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

[tab]                      [ch]G#[/ch]
Any other day i would call[/tab]

you would say
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                  
"baby how's your day ?"[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
but today it aint the same[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
every other word is [/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]
Uh Huh, Yea Okay,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]
could it be that you, [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
are at the crib with anotha lady?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                            [ch]G#[/ch]
If you took it there first if all[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Fm[/ch]
let me say, i am not the one[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
to sit around and be played[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cm[/ch]
so prove your self to me,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G#[/ch] 
or the girl that you claim[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fm[/ch]
why don't you say the thangs[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
that you said to me yesterday?[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
I know you say that i am assuming things[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]
Something's going down thats the way it seems[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]
Shouldn't be the reason why you're acting strange[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
If nobody's holding you back from me[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Cm[/ch]
Cause I know how you useually do[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G#[/ch]
When you say everything to me times two[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]
Why can't you just tell the truth?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bb[/ch]

[Verse]

What is up with this? 
Tell the truth,
who you with ?
How would you like it if 
I came over with my clique
Don't try to change it now
See you gotta bounce
When two seconds ago
you said you just got in the house.
It's hard to believe that you, 
are at home, by yourself
when i just heard the voice
heard the voice of someone else.
Just this question 
Why do you feel you gotta lie?
Gettin caught up in your game
when you can not say my name
